panels.description: Total number of requests that were successfully authenticated and matched an Access Control policy.
panels.title: Total Authenticated Requests

panels.description: Rate of authenticated requests that could not be authorized by the matching Access Control policy.

targets.expr:
round(sum (increase(microgateway_authenticated_requests_total{managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^httproute/.+`,upstream=~`${gateway_httproute:regex}`, authorized="false"}[$__range])))/
round(sum (increase(microgateway_authenticated_requests_total{managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^httproute/.+`,upstream=~`${gateway_httproute:regex}`}[$__range])))

list.description: Allows filtering on the managing operator instance.
list.label: Microgateway Operator
list.name: operator

list.description: Allows filtering on the namespaces in which gateways are deployed.
list.label: Gateway Namespace
list.name: namespace

list.description: Allows filtering on specific gateway instance names within the selected namespaces.
list.label: Gateway Name
list.name: gateway_name

list.description: Allows filtering request metrics of the selected Gateway instances on the name of their matching HTTPRoute.
list.label: Gateway HTTPRoute
list.name: gateway_httproute
